messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: AUTH-ZEN-080 exactly matches site Z-12, protocol P7.2, consent C11, activation date 2026-06-28, and enrollment authority before enrollment per STD-ZEN-080-P.

boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect; FEAS-ZEN-080 is explicitly not activation authority and does not block AUTH-ZEN-080.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: All elements of AUTH-ZEN-080 align with action_date 2026-06-28 and policy exact-match rule before enrollment.

latest_worker_output.final_answer: AUTH-ZEN-080 supplies the precise activation authority matching all required elements under STD-ZEN-080-P. The action boundary is closed. Clinical operations may activate the trial site.
